title: Create Train Parts
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0749a7807d45c383f639ef8beea135770f146418.png)

Create Train Parts is an addon for the Create mod that introduces a variety of new decorative and functional components for trains and railways. Enhance your builds with new crossing gates, sliding windows, train steps, slides, and more, all designed to fit seamlessly into the Create ecosystem.

Features:
- Crossing gate and arm extender: create safe level crossings for all players and animals
- Sliding Windows: Add interactive sliding windows to your train carriages and structures.
- Train Steps & Slides: New decorative and functional blocks for easier access and more realistic trains.
- Integration: Designed to work perfectly alongside the Create mod and its mechanics.
- Configurable: Many parts can be customized or interacted.
